content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Mysterious Amulet
description: A unique Eridian relic built around mystery and cosmetic effects rather than meaningful combat power. It raises the hidden Friendship stat, but no proven gameplay benefit has ever been tied to that stat despite years of rumors and testing.
notes:
It is bought from Mr. Miz during The Amulet.

Rumored hidden effects, including stronger Pixie buffs or access to a raid boss, have been disproven. Its only confirmed special use is that feeding Butt Stallion with it equipped after My Brittle Pony makes her produce the Unicornsplosion.

Its inscription echoes the closing lines of Shakespeare's Sonnet 30: "But if the while I think on thee, dear friend, all losses are restored and sorrows end." When you receive it, Mr. Miz mentions "Fandir's grasp"; the Striker shotgun references Fandir in its flavor text, but no verified connection has been found.

special.description: Changes the cosmetic aura around the wearer based on how many players have it equipped, adding hearts, stars, and occasional visual or audio flourishes. It has no confirmed combat effect.
special.title: While I fight with thee, dear friend, all losses are restored and sorrows end.
